name: Banca Sistema S.p.A.
summary: Banca Sistema S.p.A. provides various business and retail banking products and services in Italy. The company offers factoring services that cover non-recourse and recourse factoring, VAT receivables, maturity factoring, receivables certifications, and credit management and recovery products; tax receivables management, maturity factoring, and the certification of receivables from the public administration; and online factoring. Its banking solutions include current accounts, and time and securities deposits; and salary and pension backed loans, and collateralized loans. The company's solutions also include zero cost current and deposit account; and a banking instrument that allows customers to keep and manage their investments. Banca Sistema S.p.A. was founded in 2011 and is based in Milan, Italy.
